dockerfile_change.prior_base_digest_status: NOT_RECOVERABLE: layers in prior local image are entirely different from today base
dockerfile_change.c02_claim: Eliminates mutable base tag drift from this build point forward. Does NOT reproduce sha256:a9af9cc5.

layer_analysis.base_layers_1_to_5: IDENTICAL — base image pin is working
layer_analysis.cause: BuildKit embeds wall-clock timestamps in layer tar entries. Without SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH, file modification times inside pip install and COPY layers differ between builds even when content is identical. This produces different layer hashes and therefore different image IDs.

next_non_deterministic_factor.description: BuildKit layer tar timestamp embedding (no SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH)
next_non_deterministic_factor.fix: Set SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH in docker build environment to force deterministic timestamps
